message:
test(fuzz_malloc): promote leak-fda3fea5664e1bcade667a36be834ed30b83bc54 to corpus (bd-q9x3h)

Promote the 8-byte reproducer captured from fuzz_malloc into the
seed corpus so future fuzz campaigns treat this input as a first-class
regression check, matching the pattern already established for
fuzz_pathname's leak-f413061db regression in 9e170061.

bd-q9x3h (AllocationArena leaked quarantined entries on drop) was
fixed by adding Drop for ArenaShard, which now deallocs live slots
and drains quarantine entries. Keeping the original LSan reproducer
in the corpus guarantees any future regression of that Drop impl is
caught within the first few thousand iterations rather than requiring
a full campaign to rediscover.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
